complete_user_guide/system_management/in.本章节介绍系统级通用配置。点击右上角 **齿轮图标** 进入 **设置**，左侧: This chapter covers system-level configuration. Click the **gear icon** at the top right to open **Settings**. The left navigation is split into: **Team** (Admin only), **Manage Models**, **System Settings** (Language, Host, System Configuration, Capture Module, Model Updater, Programming Default Parameters, Error Type Translation, Tags, Calibration, About, Log), and **Log Out**.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.若为首次部署且尚未创建其他账号，请使用部署时提供的 `admin` 初始账号登录: On a fresh deployment with no other accounts yet, log in with the initial `admin` account provided at deployment time to complete the baseline setup.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.系统内置三类角色（当前版本账号创建后不支持在界面内修改角色或禁用 / 启用，只能: Three built-in roles ship with the system (the current release does not support changing a role or enabling / disabling an account from the UI — only Create and Delete):
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.PCB 产品创建、编程、训练、检测: Create PCB products, program, train, inspect
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.视觉 / 工艺工程师进行模板与参数维护: Vision / process engineers maintaining templates and parameters
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.仅执行检测任务与缺陷反馈: Run inspection tasks and submit defect feedback only
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.进入：右上角齿轮 → **设置** → 左侧 **团队**。: Open: gear icon → **Settings** → **Team** on the left.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.新增账号：点击\"添加编程人员\"或\"添加操作员\"快捷入口 → 填写 用户名: Create an account: click *Add Programmer* or *Add Operator* → fill in a unique username, an initial password, and the role → Save.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.删除账号：在列表对应行点击省略号菜单 → **删除** → 确认。: Delete an account: click the *…* menu on the row → **Delete** → confirm.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.操作完成或离开工位时，请立即在\"设置\"中登出，防止他人误用会话。: When you finish or leave the workstation, log out from **Settings** right away so the session can't be misused.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.系统支持界面多语言（当前已支持：中文 / English）。多语言切换只影响 U: The UI supports multiple languages (currently Chinese / English). Language switching only changes UI strings — existing PCB product names and component designators are unaffected.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.登录后点击右上角齿轮进入 **设置**。: After login, click the gear icon at the top right to open **Settings**.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.在左侧 **系统设置** → **语言** 中找到\"系统语言\"。: On the left, go to **System Settings → Language** to find *System language*.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.下拉选择目标语言（中文 / English）后，界面自动应用。: Pick the target language (Chinese / English) from the drop-down; the UI applies it immediately.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.语言切换不会重启后端；若浏览器多标签页打开本系统，请全部刷新以保持一致。: Language switching does not restart the backend; if the system is open in multiple browser tabs, refresh them all to keep them in sync.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.用于让当前浏览器前端连接指定的后端服务实例，并在多个部署环境（本地 / 测试 /: Lets the browser frontend connect to a specific backend instance and switch quickly among deployment environments — local, staging, production, fallback node.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.产线上使用笔记本或平板（Wi‑Fi）直接访问机台后端，无需占用后端主机显示器。: On the line, use a laptop or tablet over Wi-Fi to talk to the machine's backend without occupying the host's monitor.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.质检 / 工程 人员可在不同工位快速切换到测试或生产环境查看训练 / 检测状态。: QA / engineering staff can hop between workstations and switch quickly between staging and production to check training / inspection status.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.支持远程协助：暂时指向测试服务器复现问题，再切回生产。: Supports remote assistance: point temporarily at the staging server to reproduce a problem, then switch back to production.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.集中管理：同一前端界面可按需切换不同产线后端，统一查看检测结果、启动训练或执行任: Centralized management: the same frontend can switch between line-side backends on demand — view inspection results, start training, or run tasks — without logging into each host separately.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.点击右上角齿轮 → **设置**，在左侧选择 **系统设置** → **主机**: Click the gear icon → **Settings**, then pick **System Settings → Host** on the left.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.在\"当前主机\"输入框中查看 / 修改后端地址（默认为 `localhost:: The *Current host* input shows or edits the backend address (defaults to `localhost:8000`). The protocol drop-down toggles between `http://` and `https://`.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.输入新的服务地址（含端口，如 `10.0.0.12:8000`）。: Type the new address (including the port, e.g. `10.0.0.12:8000`).
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.进入路径：右上角齿轮 → **设置** → **系统设置** → **系统配置*: Open: gear icon → **Settings → System Settings → System Configuration**.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.页面标题为\"编辑系统配置\"，包含以下几个配置区块（Admin / 编程员 可: The page is titled *Edit System Configuration* and contains the following blocks (visible to Admin and Programmer):
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.用于配置将检测结果导出至 MES 系统的行为。: Configures how inspection results are exported to a MES system.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.用于保存导出的 MES 文件与相关资源；请确保目标目录存在且有写入权限。: Where the exported MES files and related artifacts are saved. Make sure the target directory exists and is writable.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.导出包含检测概览、统计与缺陷摘要的报告文件，便于对外流转与存档。: Export a report file containing the inspection overview, statistics, and a defect summary — useful for handoff and archival.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.针对每个缺陷元件导出裁剪的局部图像，便于 MES 或质检系统联动查看细节。: For each defective component, export a cropped local image so MES or downstream QA systems can view the detail.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.导出整板拼接大图，用于复核现场光照、对齐与整体检测效果。: Export the stitched whole-board image to review on-site lighting, alignment, and overall inspection quality.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.控制导出 JPEG 等有损格式的压缩质量；数值越大图像越清晰、文件体积越大。: Controls JPEG / other lossy-format quality on export; higher values are sharper but larger.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.在导出目录中为报告与图像设置保留天数；超过期限的历史文件可由系统定期清理，节省空: Retention period for reports and images in the export directory; expired files are cleaned up by the periodic sweep to free space.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.管理检测结果数据的保留与清理策略。: Manages the retention and cleanup policy for inspection-result data.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.超过此天数的历史检测结果将在定时清理时被删除。: Historical inspection results older than this are deleted by the scheduled cleanup.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.剩余磁盘空间低于此值时系统启动警告；设为 0 可禁用。: The system warns when free disk space drops below this value; set to 0 to disable.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.检测图像等大文件的存储卷；若默认盘空间不足可切换至其他卷，修改后需重启生效。: The volume that stores large files such as inspection images. Switch to another volume if the default drive is short on space; restart for the change to take effect.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.启用后，系统将在指定时间自动清理超期检测记录。: When enabled, the system runs the cleanup at the configured time and removes expired records.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.点击后立即触发清理任务，将超过保留天数的检测记录删除。适用于需要快速释放磁盘空间: Clicking it kicks off the cleanup immediately, deleting records past the retention period — useful when you need to free disk space quickly.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.启用后，实时检测页面检测到合格（OK）时弹出确认窗口，由操作员手动判定合格或不合: When enabled, every Pass (OK) verdict on the Live page surfaces a confirmation dialog so the operator can confirm Pass or override to NG.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.进入路径：右上角齿轮 → **设置** → **系统设置** → **捕获模块*: Open: gear icon → **Settings → System Settings → Capture Module**.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.页面标题为\"捕获模块\"（Admin / 编程员 可见），提供采集与传感器的关: The page is titled *Capture Module* (visible to Admin and Programmer) and exposes the key capture and sensor parameters; saving reloads the page automatically.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.图像拼接时水平方向允许的最大像素偏移量。: Maximum horizontal pixel offset allowed during stitching.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.图像拼接时垂直方向允许的最大像素偏移量。: Maximum vertical pixel offset allowed during stitching.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.相邻采集帧之间的重叠区域大小。: Size of the overlap region between adjacent capture frames.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.开关。启用后拼接算法将动态调整重叠区域大小。: Switch; when on, the stitching algorithm adapts the overlap dynamically.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.**步骤路径（steps path）**：采集输出目录；虚拟相机模式下系统从此目: **Steps path**: the capture output directory. Under virtual-camera mode, the system reads images from this directory. Development / debugging only.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.传感器增益值；过高会引入噪声，过低则图像偏暗。: Sensor gain. Too high introduces noise; too low darkens the image.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.基线曝光时间（单位因硬件而异）；现场光照稳定后再调整。: Baseline exposure time (units depend on the hardware). Tune only after on-site lighting is stable.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.进入路径：右上角齿轮 → **设置** → **系统设置** → **模型更新器: Open: gear icon → **Settings → System Settings → Model Updater**.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.页面标题为\"模型更新器配置\"（Admin / 编程员 可见），用于在运行过程: The page is titled *Model Updater Configuration* (visible to Admin and Programmer). It updates the color thresholds and ratio parameters of each inspection module automatically — or semi-automatically — based on on-site image statistics, to improve robustness on 2D solder / lead inspections. Saving reloads the page automatically.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.是否允许在更新周期内自动调整颜色范围阈值区间。: Whether the color-range threshold can be auto-adjusted during the update cycle.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.是否允许根据统计结果更新颜色比例阈值，提高分割与缺陷筛选可靠性。: Whether the color-ratio threshold can be updated from statistics, improving segmentation and defect-filter reliability.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.是否允许 AI 模型的更新结果覆盖本地统计参数。: Whether AI-model update results can override the local statistical parameters.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.红色通道占比下限，用于限定有效焊点颜色特征范围。: Lower bound for the red-channel ratio, used to constrain the valid solder-joint color range.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.红色通道占比上限。: Upper bound for the red-channel ratio.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.非红色通道占比下限；与红色比例共同约束目标的颜色分布，避免误检。: Lower bound for the non-red ratio; together with the red ratio, constrains the target color distribution and reduces false positives.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.非红色通道占比上限。: Upper bound for the non-red ratio.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.是否允许自动调整引脚区域的颜色范围阈值。: Whether the color-range threshold for the lead region can be auto-adjusted.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.是否允许更新引脚颜色比例阈值。: Whether the lead color-ratio threshold can be updated.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.引脚焊接区域颜色比例下限。: Lower bound for the lead solder region's color ratio.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.引脚焊接区域颜色比例上限。: Upper bound for the lead solder region's color ratio.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.开启自动更新（更新颜色范围 / 更新颜色比例）后，请在稳定的光照与工艺条件下运行: After enabling auto-update (**Update Color Range** / **Update Color Ratio**), run for a while under stable lighting and process conditions so statistics can accumulate; otherwise short-term fluctuations may swing the parameters too far.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.建议结合版本管理或备份原始配置文件，必要时可回滚到上一版本参数集。: Pair this with version control or back up the original configuration file so you can roll back to an earlier parameter set if needed.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.进入路径：右上角齿轮 → **设置** → **系统设置** → **编程默认参: Open: gear icon → **Settings → System Settings → Programming Default Parameters** (visible to Admin and Programmer).
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.用途：为新建 PCB 产品或新增检测项提供一套\"起始参数模板\"。保存后，这些: Purpose: provides a *starter parameter template* for new PCB products and new inspection items. Once saved, these defaults seed each module's initial thresholds and color ranges.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.页面以标签页方式呈现各检测模块（如 焊接检测 2D、引脚检测 2D、DIP 焊点: The page exposes per-module tabs (Solder Inspection 2D, Lead Inspection 2D, DIP Solder Inspection, and so on), plus an **Other Parameters** global tab.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.元件允许的最大旋转偏差（度，0–360）。: Maximum allowed rotational deviation for a component (degrees, 0–360).
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.元件允许的最大位置偏移（毫米）。: Maximum allowed positional shift for a component (millimeters).
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.启用后检测时将拍摄完整板面而非仅分区拍摄。: When on, inspection captures the full board instead of tile-by-tile.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.视野对齐时允许的最大像素偏移（0–100）。: Maximum pixel offset allowed during FOV alignment (0–100).
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.标记点对齐时允许的最大像素偏移（1–5000）。: Maximum pixel offset allowed during Mark Point alignment (1–5000).
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.检测复核时的默认反馈选项：OK（合格）或 NG（不合格）。: Default feedback option used during review: OK (pass) or NG (fail).
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.拼版判废比例（wasted_array_board_failure_ratio）: **Wasted-array-board failure ratio** (``wasted_array_board_failure_ratio``) is now configured per product under **Teach → Recipe → Inspection Settings** and is no longer shown here.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.进入路径：右上角齿轮 → **设置** → **系统设置** → **错误类型翻: Open: gear icon → **Settings → System Settings → Error Type Translation** (visible to Admin and Programmer).
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.用于自定义元件级缺陷 / 错误类型的中英文显示标签，以及对应的 MES 厂商代码: Lets you customize the Chinese and English display labels for each component-level defect / error type, plus the corresponding MES vendor code. Changes propagate to every connected device on save.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.**错误类型**：系统内置的错误类型标识（只读）。: **Error Type**: the system's built-in error-type identifier (read-only).
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.**英文标签**：在界面与报告中显示的英文名称，可按需自定义。: **English Label**: the English name shown in the UI and in reports; customizable.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.**中文标签**：在界面与报告中显示的中文名称，可按需自定义。: **Chinese Label**: the Chinese name shown in the UI and in reports; customizable.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.将内部错误类型映射到 MES 系统的外发错误代码。留空则按原样传递内部错误类型。: Maps internal error types to outbound MES error codes. An empty mapping passes the internal type through unchanged.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.**MES 厂商代码**：导出 MES 结果时使用的错误代码映射；留空表示原样传: **MES vendor code**: the error-code mapping used when exporting to MES; leave blank to pass through as-is.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.进入路径：右上角齿轮 → **设置** → **系统设置** → **标签**: Open: gear icon → **Settings → System Settings → Tags** (visible to Admin and Programmer).
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.标签（Tags）是附加到 PCB 产品程序上的自定义分类标记，用于在产品列表和检: Tags are user-defined labels attached to PCB product programs; they speed up filtering on the product list and during inspection-task setup. A tag appears on this page once it is bound to at least one program.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.**产品数**：使用该标签的产品数量（只读）。: **Product count**: number of products using this tag (read-only).
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.**重命名**：点击\"重命名\"按钮，在弹窗中输入新名称后确认；重命名将同步应: **Rename**: click *Rename*, type the new name in the dialog, and confirm; the rename applies to every product carrying the tag. A collision with an existing tag triggers an error.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.**删除**：点击\"删除\"按钮，确认后该标签将从所有已绑定产品中移除。: **Delete**: click *Delete* and confirm; the tag is removed from every product currently carrying it.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.在产品列表（首页）选中产品后可批量添加或移除标签；在编辑产品信息时也可为单个产品: From the product list on the home page, select products to batch-add or batch-remove tags; tags can also be managed per product via *Edit Info*.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.用于在线更新相机的内参 / 畸变参数，确保尺寸测量及对齐精度。当出现以下任一情况: Updates the camera's intrinsic and distortion parameters in the field to keep dimensional measurement and alignment accurate. Run an on-site calibration when any of the following apply:
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.更换或重新安装相机 / 镜头；: The camera or lens was replaced or reinstalled.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.调整过镜头焦距或光圈，导致成像比例明显变化；: The lens focal length or aperture was changed, producing a visibly different imaging scale.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.相机支撑结构被移动、震动或维护后位置可能偏移；: The camera mount was moved, knocked, or serviced and may have shifted.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.图像边缘出现明显拉伸 / 弯曲，或测量尺寸偏差增大；: The image edges show visible stretch or curvature, or measured dimensions drift more than usual.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.模板匹配稳定性下降（需先排除光照与污渍因素）。: Template-matching stability has dropped (rule out lighting and contamination first).
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.校准操作会更新当前使用的标定文件（`certificate.bin`）。若需保留: Calibration updates the active calibration file (`certificate.bin`). Back up the original by hand before running it if you want to keep the previous version.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.使用官方提供的标定板（保持清洁、无划痕、无强反光）；: Use the official calibration target (keep it clean, scratch-free, and free of strong reflections).
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.确保现场光照稳定，避免强烈局部反射；: Ensure on-site lighting is stable and free of strong local reflections.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.传送带参数（宽度 / 速度）已正确配置。: Conveyor parameters (width / speed) are configured correctly.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.打开：右上角齿轮 → **设置** → **系统设置** → **校准**。: Open: gear icon → **Settings → System Settings → Calibration**.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.将标定板放置在传送带中央，棋盘格（或圆点阵）面朝上，整体尽量覆盖相机主要视野；保: Place the calibration target flat in the center of the conveyor, checkerboard (or dot pattern) facing up, covering as much of the camera's primary field of view as possible; keep it level — no tilt.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.点击\"开始校准\"。系统将自动执行：进板 → 拍照采集 → 出板。: Click **Start Calibration**. The system automatically runs PCB In → capture → PCB Out.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.采集完成后前端显示进度与结果状态；成功时出现\"校准成功\"提示。: When capture finishes, the frontend shows progress and result status; a *Calibration successful* prompt appears on success.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.校准文件 `certificate.bin` 自动更新；可记录时间戳以便追溯。: The calibration file `certificate.bin` is updated automatically; record the timestamp for traceability if you want.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.校准过程中勿触碰标定板或传送带，避免产生运动模糊导致参数偏差。: Do not touch the target or the conveyor during calibration — motion blur will throw off the parameters.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.进入路径：右上角齿轮 → **设置** → **系统设置** → **关于**。: Open: gear icon → **Settings → System Settings → About**.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.**加密有效期至** \\ （若存在）：授权到期日期；若已过期请联系技术支持更新: **Licence expiry** (when present): the licence end date. If it has expired, contact technical support to renew.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.进入路径：右上角齿轮 → **设置** → **系统设置** → **日志**。: Open: gear icon → **Settings → System Settings → Log**.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.页面提供一个数字输入框，取值范围 **0–10 的整数**：: The page offers a numeric input that accepts **integers 0–10**:
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.**0**：仅输出错误与启动 / 关闭信息（最简）。: **0**: errors plus start / stop messages only — quietest.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.**3–5**：常规生产环境推荐值，仅记录关键流程与必要诊断信息。: **3–5**: recommended for production — logs the critical flow and the diagnostics actually needed.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.**8–10**：调试 / 排查问题时使用；记录每次检测的详细推理过程与中间数据: **8–10**: for debugging and troubleshooting — logs every inspection's detailed inference flow and intermediate data.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.调整后点击 **应用** 按钮立即生效，无需重启后端服务；当前值由后端持久保存，: Click **Apply** after editing; the change takes effect immediately, no backend restart required. The current value is persisted on the backend and survives a restart.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.将日志详细程度调到较高值（约 8–10）会显著增加每次检测的耗时（约 100–2: Raising log verbosity to a high value (around 8–10) significantly increases per-board inspection time (roughly 100–200 ms per board) and disk usage. Keep verbosity low day-to-day and only raise it temporarily for troubleshooting, then drop it back.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.**设置** 左侧的 **管理模型** 用于查看系统中的检测模型（按 全部 /: **Manage Models** on the left of **Settings** lists the inspection models in the system (filterable by All / Pre-trained / Trained), and supports Upload, Train, Set as Default, Rename, Export, and Delete, along with dataset Export / Import and training-warmup reset. The full reference for training and dataset operations lives in :ref:`模型管理`.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.随着检测记录不断积累，硬盘空间会逐渐减少，建议定期进行数据备份和清理。: As inspection records pile up, disk space dwindles — back up and clean up data periodically.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.左上角 File → FTP mount points 可配置 FTP 服务器，: Top-left **File → FTP mount points** configures an FTP server for remote backup to a NAS or other network drive.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.右上角 Destination Volume 用于选择目标盘（如移动硬盘、第二磁: **Destination Volume** at the top-right picks the target drive (an external drive, a second internal disk, and so on).
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.上方搜索栏可按产品名或序列号快速检索检测记录。: The search bar at the top filters inspection records by product name or serial number.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.搜索栏旁边的过滤器按钮可按日期、时间等条件过滤记录，便于批量操作。: The filter button next to the search bar filters by date / time so batch operations are easier.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.选择目标盘（Destination Volume），如需远程备份可先配置 FTP: Pick the **Destination Volume**; configure FTP first if you need remote backup.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.可通过搜索栏输入产品名或序列号，或点击 过滤器 按钮按日期/时间筛选需要迁移的检: Filter the records to migrate by typing a product name or serial number in the search bar, or by clicking the filter button to filter by date / time.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.在列表中框选或按住 Shift 选中多个检测记录。: Drag-select or Shift-click to pick multiple records in the list.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.点击下方 Archive 按钮，即可将选中的记录迁移至目标盘。: Click the **Archive** button at the bottom to migrate the selected records to the destination drive.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.如需恢复数据，可点击 Unarchive 按钮从目标盘导入。: Click **Unarchive** to restore data from the destination drive.
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.目标磁盘中的归档文件示意: Archive files on the destination drive
complete_user_guide/system_management/in.建议定期将重要检测数据备份到安全存储介质，防止因硬盘故障或空间不足导致数据丢失。: Back up critical inspection data to safe storage periodically so a disk failure or space shortage doesn't lose it.
